Simons mobile

A popular Burlington spot in gouache

  • Written: Dec 27, 2025

I did this one a few weeks ago based on a photo I took and kept coming back to of golden hour light dripping from the original city market in burlington. I used goauche and love the brightness that it offers compared to watercolor.

  • art
